headline: Caterpillar (CAT) CFO Andrew Bonfield to Retire
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) is one of the 10 Best Performing Dow Stocks So Far in 2026. On April 9, 2026, Reuters reported that Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) announced that CFO Andrew Bonfield will retire in October. The firm has chosen company veteran Kyle Epley as his successor. Epley will take over the post in May, having previously […]

headline: AI Did What Trump's Tariffs Didn't: Revive US Manufacturing
summary: U.S. manufacturing PMI hit 54 in April, a 47-month high. AI capex, not Trump tariffs, is doing the heavy lifting — and Wall Street is betting on more.

headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Valuation Check After A Strong Short Term Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot Caterpillar (CAT) has drawn investor attention after a period of strong share price returns. The stock is up 3.3% over the past day, 8.1% over the past week and 16.6% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Caterpillar. This latest surge adds to a strong run, with a 33.3% 90 day share price return and a very large 1 year total shareholder return. This may hint at changing growth expectations and a shift in how the market is pricing Caterpillar's risks and...

headline: Warren Buffett Found Plenty of Stock Buys Over the Years. Right Now His Company Looks Like One.
summary: Berkshire Hathaway stock is in the midst of one of its worst periods of underperformance relative to the S&P 500, since Warren Buffett took control in 1965.
